name: UNIVERSAL TECHNICAL INSTITUTE INC
business: Universal Technical Institute, Inc. is a leading workforce education provider offering high-quality training programs for transportation, skilled trades, energy, and healthcare careers. The company operates through two segments: Universal Technical Institute (UTI) which provides transportation and skilled trades training, and Concorde Career Colleges which offers healthcare education. Students pay tuition, and the company also generates revenue from manufacturer-specific advanced training programs and dealer technician training services.
sellsTo: students seeking career training in transportation, skilled trades, energy, and healthcare
manufacturers and dealers through advanced training and technician staffing services

exposures.sentence: UTI announced the expansion of its core automotive program to include new Battery Hybrid Electric Vehicle and Electric Vehicle ( EV ) courses with roll out completed during 2025 at the following campuses: Avondale, Arizona; Orlando, Florida; Bloomfield, New Jersey; Dallas, Texas; Austin, Texas; Houston, Texas; and Miramar, Florida.

For skilled trades and other transportation programs, the U.S. DOL BLS estimates an average of ... 2,300 new job openings for wind turbine service technicians will exist annually for new entrants through 2034 in these fields.

The table below provides an overview of the programs taught by UTI owned and operated institutions, including ... Robotics & Automation (2018) - Design, program, operate, and maintain robotic systems.
Industrial Maintenance (2007) - Diagnose, service, test and repair various types of machinery.
Diagnostic Medical Sonography (2021) - Use special imaging equipment that directs sound waves into a patient’s body to assess and diagnose various medical conditions.
Cardiovascular Sonography (2021) - Use special imaging equipment that directs sound waves into a patient’s body to assess and diagnose various medical conditions.
UTI offers a wide range of degree and non-degree transportation, skilled trades, and energy technical training programs.

catalysts.sentence: UTI announced Atlanta, Georgia as the location of the division’s next new campus ( UTI Atlanta ). Pending regulatory approvals, UTI Atlanta will open in 2026.

UTI announced the division’s second new campus will be in San Antonio, Texas ( UTI San Antonio ). This new campus, once open, will be the first skilled trades and energy education focused campus. Pending regulatory approvals, UTI San Antonio will open in 2026, bringing the total number of UTI campuses nationwide to 17.
UTI signed a new facility lease agreement for a major expansion of its Dallas, Texas campus, adding a new 30,000-square-foot facility expected to open in early 2026.

Concorde signed a new facility lease agreement related to our partnership with Heartland Dental to construct a new co-branded campus in Fort Myers, Florida, which is expected to open in early fiscal 2026, pending regulatory approvals, and will bring the total number of Concorde campuses nationwide to 18.

Concorde announced plans to relocate its Aurora, Colorado campus to Denver, Colorado to increase its campus footprint and expand student capacity to address the skilled workforce gap. Pending receipt of regulatory approvals, the new 60,000-square-foot facility will offer expanded programs and enhanced simulation and dental hygiene clinic spaces to support student learning and community engagement. Construction is underway, with opening planned for 2026.

catalysts.event: Launch of Electrical, Electronics & Industrial Technology (EEIT) program at Exton, PA and Mooresville, NC
catalysts.sentence: The Exton, Pennsylvania and Mooresville, North Carolina campuses are the first campuses to begin teaching the EEIT program.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 111,100 new job openings annually for newly trained technicians in automotive, diesel, and collision fields through 2034.
tamClaims.sentence: The United States Department of Labor Bureau of Labor Statistics ( U.S. DOL BLS ) estimates an average of approximately 111,100 new job openings, due to growth and net replacements, will exist annually for newly trained technicians in the automotive, diesel, and collision fields through 2034.

tamClaims.claim: For skilled trades and other transportation programs, an average of 45,700 new job openings for industrial machinery mechanics annually through 2034.
tamClaims.sentence: Additionally, for skilled trades and other transportation programs, the U.S. DOL BLS estimates an average of 45,700 new jobs openings for industrial machinery mechanics; 45,600 new job openings for welders; 40,100 new job openings in the heating, air conditioning, and refrigeration industry; 13,500 new job openings for computer-controlled machine tool operators; 13,100 new job openings for aviation technicians; 6,000 new job openings for robotics; 4,100 new job openings for marine and motorcycle technicians; and 2,300 new job openings for wind turbine service technicians will exist annually for new entrants through 2034 in these fields.

tamClaims.claim: For healthcare support occupations, an average of 1,286,700 new jobs annually through 2034.
tamClaims.sentence: The market for qualified healthcare support occupations across the programs that Concorde offers is growing even faster, with the U.S. DOL BLS estimating an annual average of 1,286,700 new jobs annually through 2034.
